message:
feat(workflows): Add Workflow trait, WorkflowContext, and enhanced types (wa-nu4.1.1.1)

- Add Workflow trait with name/description, handles(detection), steps(),
  execute_step(ctx, step_idx) -> StepResult, and optional cleanup()
- Add WorkflowContext struct with StorageHandle, pane_id, PaneCapabilities,
  trigger event, and WorkflowConfig
- Enhance StepResult with timeout_ms field for WaitFor variant
- Enhance WaitCondition with optional pane_id for Pattern and PaneIdle
- Add WorkflowConfig for default timeouts and retry settings
- Add helper methods for all enums (StepResult::cont(), WaitCondition::pattern(), etc.)
- Add comprehensive tests including stub workflow that compiles and executes
- Tests verify exhaustive StepResult transitions and serialization

This enables durable, resumable workflows with a uniform execution model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
